evidence.description: Nasr co-authored a 2023 book with Ali Vaez, a confirmed IEI member, on sanctions relief for Iran. Nasr himself is not named in the leaked IEI cables; the association is noted as a relevant contextual fact, not a confirmed membership claim.

editorial_notes: Nasr is not a confirmed IEI member. Connection is noted due to co-authorship with Vaez and aligned policy positions.
